message:
feat(raptorq): add profile pack env-request contract tests and policy fixture helper

Add policy_fixture_from_selection() helper that constructs a DualKernelPolicy
from a ProfilePackSelection, centralizing test fixture creation.

Add 4 new tests covering the ENV_REQUEST override path:
- profile_pack_env_request_keeps_canonical_metadata_when_selection_stays_canonical
- profile_pack_env_request_stamps_override_mask_bit
- env_request_with_fallback_preserves_fallback_chain_metadata
- env_request_override_mask_is_idempotent_under_apply_effective_selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
